description.en: 🦞 Unified multi-cloud OpenClaw gateway manager - auto-detect and manage all OpenClaw distributions (Official, JVS, QClaw, Cloud) with one tool
description.zh: 🦞 统一管理多云 OpenClaw 网关 - 自动检测和管理所有 OpenClaw 发行版（官方/JVS/QClaw/云端）

philosophy.en: Users deploy OpenClaw across multiple platforms and clouds. This tool provides unified management for all distributions through automatic configuration path detection.
philosophy.zh: 用户在多平台、多云端部署 OpenClaw。本工具通过自动检测配置路径，统一管理所有发行版。

supports.en: Supports OpenClaw, JVS Claw (Alibaba), QClaw (Tencent), Cloud Claw, and custom instances
supports.zh: 支持 OpenClaw、JVS Claw (阿里云)、QClaw (腾讯)、Cloud Claw 和自定义实例

message.en: This skill requires macOS. It uses LaunchAgent, launchctl, and plutil which are macOS-specific.
message.zh: 此技能需要 macOS 系统。使用了 LaunchAgent、launchctl 和 plutil 等 macOS 特有命令。

message.en: Delete operation uses rm -rf with triple confirmation and automatic backup. Use with caution.
message.zh: 删除操作使用 rm -rf，有三重确认和自动备份。请谨慎使用。

message.en: Requires jq (brew install jq), node, and OpenClaw. Run check-dependencies.sh to verify.
message.zh: 需要 jq (brew install jq)、node 和 OpenClaw。运行 check-dependencies.sh 验证。

usage.en: Run gateway-status.sh to auto-detect and manage all OpenClaw instances across platforms and clouds
usage.zh: 运行 gateway-status.sh 自动检测和管理跨平台、跨云端的所有 OpenClaw 实例

zh: 🔍 自动检测所有 OpenClaw 发行版
🗑️ 安全删除，三重确认 + 自动备份
